system.description:
Trigger: A @Trait[weather] Effect is created by a creature other than a user using an Attack or Ability (but not Intense Weather).

Effect: The triggering @Trait[weather] is removed, and the triggering creature is @Affliction[delay 20]{Delayed 20%}. If the Effect and its source lack @Trait[legendary], the source creature gains @Affliction[suppressed 5] and the source Attack/Ability is @Affliction[disabled 5] or @Affliction[nullified 5], and is @Affliction[delay 20]{Delayed 20%} further.

actions.name: Climate Controller
actions.description:
Trigger: A @Trait[weather] Effect is created by a creature other than a user using an Attack or Ability (but not Intense Weather).

Effect: The triggering @Trait[weather] is removed, and the triggering creature is @Affliction[delay 20]{Delayed 20%}. If the Effect and its source lack @Trait[legendary], the source creature gains @Affliction[suppressed 5] and the source Attack/Ability is @Affliction[disabled 5] or @Affliction[nullified 5], and is @Affliction[delay 20]{Delayed 20%} further.

cost.trigger: Trigger: A [Weather] Effect is created by a creature other than a user using an Attack or Ability (but not Intense Weather).

actions.name: Climate Controller
actions.description: Passive: The user may slot one @Trait[weather] creating Ability as an Extra Ability.
